nasb.text: The sons of Bela were five: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth and Iri. They were heads of fathers’ households, mighty men of valor, and were 22,034 enrolled by genealogy.

esv.text: The sons of Bela: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth, and Iri, five, heads of fathers’ houses, mighty warriors. And their enrollment by genealogies was 22,034.

cnv.text: 比拉的兒子是以斯本、烏西、烏薛、耶利摩和以利，共五人，都是各家族的首領，是英勇的戰士，按著家譜登記的，共有二萬二千零三十四人。

ccb.text: 比拉的五个儿子是以斯本、乌西、乌薛、耶利摩和以利，他们都是族长，是英勇的战士。按家谱记载，他们宗族共有两万二千零三十四个战士。
